title: crepis setosa var. hispida
intro: Crepis setosa var. hispida, also known as the hairy hawk's beard or smooth hawk's beard, is a flowering plant belonging to the dandelion family (Asteraceae). It is traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly in treating respiratory issues such as bronchitis, coughs, and colds, as well as its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. The plant's health benefits include reducing inflammation, relieving digestive issues, and supporting immune function. Crepis setosa var. hispida can be prepared as an herbal tea, infusion, or tincture, making it a versatile remedy for various health concerns.
